allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -ne 0\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "ok")
Bash(python -c "import urllib.request, subprocess, webbrowser, signal, os, sys, pathlib, time, json; print\('stdlib OK'\)")

Bash(PowerShell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process node,npm,'Microsoft Edge','chrome','firefox','msedge' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id, StartTime | Sort-Object StartTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5")

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force } catch {} }; Get-Process npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "nodes muertos")
PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force } catch {} }; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Output "ok")
